messages.content: Now its spins to fast and not according to actual ball speed

To adjust the rotation speed of the ball image, you can apply a scaling factor to the deltaVelocity value before adding it to the rotationAngle. This scaling factor can be adjusted to achieve the desired rotation speed. For example, you can divide the deltaVelocity by a large number like 1000 to slow down the rotation, or by a small number like 10 to speed it up.

```dart
rotationAngle += deltaVelocity / 10;
```

Adjust the scaling factor to achieve the desired rotation speed. Note that this value will depend on various factors like the size of the ball image, the speed of the ball, and the frame rate of the app, so you may need to experiment with different values to find the optimal one.
